falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes below 4,200 (a 10% decline from current levels) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakdown below this key support level would invalidate the bottom pattern and suggest continued bearish momentum, contradicting the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 150% of the 30-day average within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would indicate extreme market stress or a blowoff top, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and pattern similarity to a historical bottom.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year U.S. Treasury yield rises above 4.8% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp increase in bond yields would signal heightened inflation fears or monetary tightening, undermining the conditions typically associated with a market bottom.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
